title: UniCoord
author: Gao, Haoxiang
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: UniCoord (Universal Coordination system for scRNA-seq) is a deep learning based method for embedding, annotating and generating single cell RNA sequencing data.
steps_raw: UniCoord (Universal Coordination system for scRNA-seq) is a deep learning based method for embedding, annotating and generating single cell RNA sequencing data.
